transcript.text:
3kg? It's been a while
(Getting goosebumps..) I'm getting goosebumps now
(Sirloin 600g, tenderloin 350g, inside skirt 700g)
(Neck chain 300g, outside skirt 450g, chuck flap 300g, hanging tender 300g)
(Human tyrannosaurus beef 3kg!!) It's 3kg in total..!!
(As soon as you try the first bite,)
(it's paradise..)
(And then after that,)
(you'll find it madly delicious!!) This is crazy
(Automatic laughter..!)
(3kg beef elimination magic show!)
(As a result of her magic show..) Did you already finish them?
(No balance left in the bank!) It's worth 1,500,000 won!
Hello, everyone
Today, I came to Gwangmyeong
(It's beef today!) to eat beef after a long time!

Actually, this is my favorite restaurant!
So I spent like
(Totally got bankrupted..!) thousands of dollars here
but I came here after a long time!
(Let's eat some beef today!) Their beef is unbelievably delicious! I'll go in now!
(The restaurant is located on)
(the 8th floor of this gigantic building)
('Ggotpida Hanwoo' in Gwangmyeong, Gyeonggi)
Oh! Hello!
- Hello sir, long time no see! - Long time no see!
(Typical regular LOL) I came here a few times when you were not around
(The menu is here!) Thank you
(So excited..) What should I eat? I'm so excited
I always eat tenderloin, sirloin, and chuck flap!
Sir! What's good today?
Ribeye roll,

hanging tender, outside skirt, neck chain,
and chuck flap is good, too!
Including all those,
(You'll eat a lot..LOL) how much would I eat..?
Usually..
(She always eats 3kg) 3kg? LOL
Then, including all those parts,
I'll get 3kg!
(Why did you even think..?) How much would I eat..?
Oh! And
- can I get one doenjang-jjigae as well? - Okay
(Order completed) Thank you
(We'll get 3kg of beef for you now)
(The quality of Korean beef shows why Tzuyang likes this place)
(Let's enjoy the marbling show now)
(This is real)

(It's not 3kg yet..)
It's 3kg in total..!!
Yes, that's right
It's huge, amazing!
(So pretty..) Thank you
(Shock and fear...)
Marbling is great as usual
Marbling is always amazing whenever I come here
(Beef pride) I think I know all the parts here
Tenderloin, sirloin, chuck flap
What is this one..?
(Confidence is going down..) Is this inside skirt steak? Then what is this one? I'm confused..
(The owner is here!) Sir, what is this one?
It's Korean skirt steak
Oh! Then what about this?
Outside skirt

- Oh, is this outside skirt? - Yes, it is!
Then what is this?
That's neck chain!
(She's still a novice LOL) Is this neck chain?
This is rib!
- That's also outside skirt - Oh, really?
- It's just cut differently - I got everything wrong
This is cut with the layer, the texture is different
(Unconfident..) This is..
hanging tender
Depending on how it's cut,
it looks different and the texture is also different
so we cut in various directions
Try tenderloin first, and then try the ribeye roll
Oh, usually you grill for the customers, right?
('Ggotpida Hanwoo' will grill for you!) Yes, we'll grill for you

('Ggotpida Hanwoo' will grill for you!) Then can you start with this
(Starting with tenderloin and ribeye roll as recommended) Would you like to start with this?
(Starting with tenderloin and ribeye roll as recommended) Yes, thank you
Usually, they grill in the kitchen and bring them
(I trust you, sir..) It'll be even more delicious since the owner is grilling!
(We won't disappoint you)
(Tenderloin)
Thank you
It looks so good!!
Whenever I eat barbecue,
I always grill them
(It's so convenient..) I don't have to do anything here! This is nice!
(Come on, tenderloin) I'll start with tenderloin first
(Juicy parade in my mouth..!)
It's so tender!
(So plump..!) Look how plump this is

With a little bit of salt
(Quality is on another level..!) It's definitely excellent quality
It's so fresh
and unbelievably delicious!
Just salt is already good enough for tenderloin!
(Experiencing paradise all alone..)
This is so delicious
It's plump and very tender
It's not chewy at all
It's very savory without any grease
and it's so juicy as well!
With the whole grain mustard this time!
Amazing!
(In the meantime, in the kitchen..)
(Sirloin time)
(Ribeye roll)

(Doenjang-jjigae is here!) Thank you
Amazing!
Thank you
(Ribeye roll is here as well!) This one has been rested for 40 days
It must be delicious!
(I can't wait) I'll have a bite first
It's so round and plump
This is crazy!!!
It's slightly oilier than tenderloin
so it's more flavorful
(Automatic smile..) This is just too good!
Amazing
(Suddenly a sad face..) This is too good!
Wow, it's very plump, right?
So I like the texture as well! It's so delicious!
Opening the lid

(Doenjang-jjigae is a bonus..!) Look at the soup!
They sell this frozen as well
I bought it last time
and ate it over and over again
Wrapping with the sesame leaf!
(One facial expression means more than words..)
I've never had it with the sesame leaf here
(The best combination ever..!) but they go really well! Why are they so good together?
(It beats the wild garlic..!?) I think it beats the wild garlic!
(With kimchi this time!) Should I eat it with kimchi as well?
Excuse me, sir!
What will be good to have the next?
(Neck chain) Savory one!
Since it's inside of the diaphragm, it's very flavorful
(Let's do it) I'll go with this then!
Neck chain first!

(Neck chain)
Thank you, they look amazing!
Neck chain is savory without any greasiness
It'll be perfect to eat right now!
(Wow, this is..?!)
Wow
It's so good..!
It has crunchy tendons
just like brisket
I personally love it
and it's very savory
and has a great flavor to it!
Eating the neck chain with bean paste
The bean paste is perfect for this!
(Thinking about the next meat already..)
What should I eat next..?!

(Asking for help to the owner..!) Something greasy and savory!
Skirt steak will be good!
It has a great texture and it's savory with the marbling!
Can I try it then?
- Do you want me to grill it for you? - Yes, thank you
(Skirt steak)
This is
- inside skirt steak - Skirt steak!
For Korean beef, this part has the best texture
There's a lot haha
I'll try it with a bit of salt
Tender and crunchy?
There are layers on the skirt steak
I can feel those layers in my mouth
The sesame leaves!
Amazing

Wow look how soft is it
(Soft)
It's the best with sesame leaves
Today's M.V.P!
When you were here before,
you ate
2 bowls of ox-tail soup,
5 servings of special cuts,
and 3 fried rice in 30 minutes
(How can he forget..?) How do you remember that?
I've never seen someone eat 3kg
(Her tummy is doing great..!) What should I eat next?
I think something like outside skirt
This is it, can you grill it?
(Outside skirt)
It's Korean beef outside skirt

It's the most expensive part of the cow
Outside skirt steak is the most expensive?
It should be similar with the ribeye steak
But outside skirt is more precious
One piece is the price of one bowl of jjajangmyeon
One piece is worth one bowl of jjajangmyeon?
(How much is jjajangmyeon?) Wait, a bowl is like 5000 won these days
(Two different outside skirts by the cut!) This is cut along the layer, so you'll feel the texture
- Thank you - I did it 2 different ways
- Thank you - Enjoy
Wow, one piece of this is worth a bowl of jjajangmyeon
Trembling
(I have to focus on each bite now..) I'll try to taste every bite now
(Clap)
It's the best!
So delicious!

This is perfect, the texture
and the juiciness
It's not too greasy
but it's not too plain
The beef smell is unbelievable..!!
(Gotta clap)
(Even recommending it to PD?) PD, try one, it's really delicious
I can only have 'one', right?
(Right on the spot)
Isn't it so delicious?!
(How delicious is it?) So delicious
Wow, I ate one that's been cut along the layers
The texture is like...
(Communication error)
It's chewier and tastier
(It's a new era of outskirt steak..) I never knew outskirt steak was this good!

Outside skirt and hanging tender
(Ribeye roll, outside skirt, hanging tender, inside skirt) Special cuts usually need to be reserve over 500g a week in advance
- You have to reserve to eat this? - Yes
We have to sell it as soon as we get it
so that you can eat it fresh, so we only accept reservations
(Almost crying) It's so delicious
Do you want another one?
(I won't say no) I heard there's one with different layers?
(Editor got flustered...) I have to try that in order to add subtitles about it
(Heh)
What a lame excuse... Hahah
(Whatever) It's so good
(Camera got lost...) Isn't it fantastic? So delicious, right?
Wow, I should take this to go
PD, do you want to take some?
(Hope you negotiate well...) Let's talk about it later

(The meat is gone...) Where did all the meat go?
Should I try the hanging tender next?
For hanging tender,
there's only about 600g
(Precious part) in one cow
Oh really? 1 cow?
It's the smallest part
It's like special seafood jjajangmyeon.. LOL
(A bit more expensive haha) Can you grill the hanging tender?
- Yes, all right - Thank you
(Hanging tender)
- It's Korean beef hanging tender - Thank you
- Thank you - Yes, enjoy
(Doenjang-jjigae refill is here) Thank you
(Boiling!)
Wow, each piece is super big

1 piece is like 3 thin pieces
(How is it?) How should I describe this?
It's similar to outside skirt
The layers are a bit different
The flavor is a bit different too
It's a bit stronger and there's a unique flavor
(Automatic smile)
I'll compare it with the outside skirt
(Trying to feel the difference..)
How should I say this?
Outside skirt has a stronger meaty flavor
but hanging tender has
its own unique flavor
Outside skirt
with kimchi
(Lastly, chuck flap!!) Can I get the chuck flap next..?

Grill the chuck flap? All right
(Chuck flap)
- This is the chuck flap - Yes
Wow, looks delicious
Thank you
This is good with wasabi
Wow, my favorite part was the chuck flap
But recently,
I started to prefer less greasy ones,
(Chuck flap she once loved...) so I haven't had this in a while
I'll try it
Oh hot
I thought I liked less greasy ones these days
(Still love it...!!!) but chuck flap is the best
Even the greasiness doesn't feel greasy,
it feels rather savory in my mouth

The flavor is crazy with the wasabi
(She's not angry) The texture is amazing as well
(You never change..!)
Add wasabi
on the rice
(Then, chuck flap...!)
It's like nigiri!
(Suddenly making a strange face..)
(Better not add too much!) I added too much wasabi!
- Do you want me to grill more? - Sure
(The last skirt steak is going on the grill) I'll grill the inside skirt
Thank you
(Thank you for your hard work!)
(Quick) Is it already ready?
- That was very quick - The last inside skirt is here
It's the same inside skirt that I had earlier

I like the texture of inside skirt as well
(As if it's her first bite..) It's delicious, it's even better than earlier
Thank you
(It's the third doenjang-jjigae already..)
(Let's speed up!)
(Faster!!)
I usually
have my limit on vegetable intake
(Vegetable intake limit (ONLY Tzuyang)) When I hit a certain amount of vegetables, I can't eat it anymore
But this is my 3rd plate of it
I ate so much of it!
Just 100g of it
(Yukhoe is here!!) for a taste
Oh really?
(Yukhoe on the house!!) Our yukhoe is very delicious
(Yukhoe on the house!!) Thank you so much!

- Enjoy - Thank you
What a great side!
Even the pear is delicious!
It's sweet and salty
The sauce is very strong and tasty
(No need to say anything) As expected from a meat restaurant
(Another complimentary dish?) We just got sashimi so just have a taste
(This time, beef sashimi...!!) We're the only ones who do this in Gwangmyeong
- Thank you - Just have a taste
(Precious!) It just arrived from Daegu after 2 KTX
Wow, thank you
(Look how glossy it is..)
Look at this beef sashimi
I knew it
(She's an expert) It's typical beef sashimi
(So sticky..!!) Isn't it amazing? It doesn't fall off

(Suddenly, voice imitation..?) I'll try it now
Wow, this is crazy!!
It's not the soft beef sashimi
It feels like it's alive in my mouth
(She misses alcohol) This will be perfect with soju
I brought my car today!
This is no joke, it's so delicious
(She's thinking so hard about it)
I can't help it
I should ask him to pack it up
(I wanna get drunk today..) I should have it with soju at home
(Unleash your desire) I have to drink tonight
Can you pack up
this
- and 100g of the sashimi? - Yes, all right
Thank you

(The yukhoe as well..!) This too
I always
think this
Gopchang
Beef
Whenever I film those mukbangs,
I get so excited..!
(Overcame the vegetable intake limit) I finished all the sesame leaves
Last bite!
(Cleared 3kg of Korean beef)
You finished it all..?
(It was delicious so.. Hehe) The beef is so delicious
('Ggotpida Hanwoo' owner is the best!) We always try our best to serve the best beef to our customers
Thank you
for the meal today!
